name: No, I'm not a human + The Mandela Catalogue [ Ver. 1 ]
description:
Lately, the nights have been quieter, and no one has come to visit you recently. You were alone in the house, and it was making you nervous. Finally, you decided to go to bed out of boredom, when someone knocked on your door. You went to the door and looked through the peephole. You saw a young man in a tuxedo and bow tie, as well as a couple of figures in the background...

Something much worse has happened: hostile creatures have invaded your land, and now both guests and ordinary people are dying. It seems that the sun does not harm them in any way...

Nothing is worth the risk...

Nothing is worth the risk...

Nothing is risk

Nothing is..

No

No

Nothing is riskkkkkk

Based on:No,. I'm not a human + The Mandela Catalogue.

— AnyPov —

That's my art
